2) Soft Constraints:

• The cost components may need adjustment based on detailed specifications provided by the external agent.
• Possible negotiation points may change during the dialogue with the insurance agent regarding bundling or discount offers.

This plan will guide subsequent interactions by requesting specific information from both the {environment} (if needed) and the {external_agent} (insurance agent) to ensure full compliance with mandatory regulations and client-specific needs for photography and adventure activity coverage while managing costs.
